---
title: ""
format:
  html:
    page-layout: custom
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=IBM+Plex+Mono:wght@400;600&family=IBM+Plex+Sans:ital,wght@0,300;0,500;0,700;1,300&display=swap" rel="stylesheet"/>
    theme: none
    css: []
    toc: false
    sidebar: false
    margin-left: "0"
    margin-right: "0"
---

```{=html}
<style>
/* ── Reset & base ── */
*, *::before, *::after { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }

:root {
  --red:       #c0392b;
  --red-light: #e74c3c;
  --cream:     #f5f0e8;
  --off-white: #ede8df;
  --dark:      #1a1612;
  --mid:       #3d3530;
  --muted:     #f0ece8;
  --accent:    #d4a853;
  --grid:      rgba(192,57,43,0.07);
}

/* Kill ALL Quarto chrome on this page */
#quarto-header,
.quarto-title-banner,
#title-block-header,
.navbar,
.sidebar,
#quarto-sidebar,
#quarto-margin-sidebar,
.page-columns > .column-body > .quarto-title { display: none !important; }

body, html {
  font-family: 'IBM Plex Sans', sans-serif !important;
  background: var(--cream);
  color: var(--dark);
  overflow-x: hidden;
  width: 100%;
}

/* Remove Quarto padding that offsets for navbar */
body { padding-top: 0 !important; margin-top: 0 !important; }
main.content, div#quarto-content, .page-columns {
  padding: 0 !important;
  margin: 0 !important;
  max-width: 100% !important;
  width: 100% !important;
  gap: 0 !important;
}

/* ──────────────────────────────
   CUSTOM NAV
────────────────────────────── */
.sg-nav {
  position: fixed; top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; z-index: 9999;
  display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between;
  padding: 0 3rem; height: 60px;
  background: var(--dark);
  border-bottom: 2px solid var(--red);
}
.sg-nav-logo {
  font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace;
  font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.85rem;
  color: var(--cream); letter-spacing: 0.12em; text-transform: uppercase;
  text-decoration: none;
}
.sg-nav-logo span { color: var(--red-light); }
.sg-nav-links { display: flex; gap: 2.5rem; }
.sg-nav-links a {
  font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace;
  font-size: 0.75rem; letter-spacing: 0.1em; text-transform: uppercase;
  color: var(--muted); text-decoration: none;
  transition: color 0.2s;
}
.sg-nav-links a:hover, .sg-nav-links a.active { color: var(--red-light); }

/* ──────────────────────────────
   HERO
────────────────────────────── */
.sg-hero {
  min-height: 100vh;
  background: var(--dark);
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  position: relative;
  overflow: hidden;
}
.sg-hero::before {
  content: '';
  position: absolute; inset: 0; pointer-events: none;
  background-image:
    linear-gradient(var(--grid) 1px, transparent 1px),
    linear-gradient(90deg, var(--grid) 1px, transparent 1px);
  background-size: 60px 60px;
}
.sg-hero-left {
  padding: 140px 4rem 6rem 4rem;
  display: flex; flex-direction: column; justify-content: center;
  position: relative; z-index: 1;
  max-width: 860px;
}
.sg-hero-tag {
  font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace;
  font-size: 0.7rem; letter-spacing: 0.2em; text-transform: uppercase;
  color: var(--red-light); margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
  display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.75rem;
  animation: fadeUp 0.5s ease 0.1s both;
}
.sg-hero-tag::before { content:''; display:block; width:32px; height:2px; background:var(--red); }

.sg-hero-title {
  font-family: 'IBM Plex Sans', sans-serif !important;
  font-weight: 700 !important;
  font-size: clamp(2.8rem, 5vw, 4.5rem) !important;
  line-height: 1.05 !important;
  color: var(--cream) !important;
  margin-bottom: 1.5rem !important;
  border: none !important;
  padding: 0 !important;
  animation: fadeUp 0.5s ease 0.2s both;
}
.sg-hero-title em { font-style: italic; font-weight: 300; color: var(--accent); }

.sg-hero-cta { display: flex; gap: 1rem; flex-wrap: wrap; animation: fadeUp 0.5s ease 0.4s both; }
.sg-btn-primary {
  font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace;
  font-size: 0.75rem; letter-spacing: 0.1em; text-transform: uppercase;
  padding: 0.85rem 2rem;
  background: var(--red); color: var(--cream);
  border: 2px solid var(--red); cursor: pointer; text-decoration: none;
  transition: background 0.2s, color 0.2s; display: inline-block;
}
.sg-btn-primary:hover { background: transparent; color: var(--red-light); }
.sg-btn-secondary {
  font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace;
  font-size: 0.75rem; letter-spacing: 0.1em; text-transform: uppercase;
  padding: 0.85rem 2rem;
  background: transparent; color: var(--muted);
  border: 2px solid var(--mid); cursor: pointer; text-decoration: none;
  transition: border-color 0.2s, color 0.2s; display: inline-block;
}
.sg-btn-secondary:hover { border-color: var(--muted); color: var(--cream); }



/* ──────────────────────────────
   STATS BAR
────────────────────────────── */
.sg-stats {
  background: var(--off-white);
  border-top: 3px solid var(--red);
  border-bottom: 1px solid #d8d2c8;
  display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr);
}
.sg-stat {
  padding: 2rem 2.5rem;
  border-right: 1px solid #d8d2c8;
}
.sg-stat:last-child { border-right: none; }
.sg-stat-num {
  font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace;
  font-size: 2rem; font-weight: 600; color: var(--red); line-height: 1; margin-bottom: 0.4rem;
}
.sg-stat-label { font-size: 0.8rem; font-weight: 300; color: var(--dark); }

/* ──────────────────────────────
   ABOUT SECTION
────────────────────────────── */
.sg-about {
  padding: 7rem 4rem;
  background: var(--cream);
}
.sg-about-inner {
  max-width: 1200px; margin: 0 auto;
  display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 5rem; align-items: start;
}
.sg-section-tag {
  font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace;
  font-size: 0.7rem; letter-spacing: 0.2em; text-transform: uppercase;
  color: var(--red); margin-bottom: 1rem;
  display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.75rem;
}
.sg-section-tag::before { content:''; display:block; width:24px; height:2px; background:var(--red); }
.sg-section-title {
  font-family: 'IBM Plex Sans', sans-serif !important;
  font-size: clamp(1.8rem, 3vw, 2.8rem) !important;
  font-weight: 700 !important; line-height: 1.1 !important;
  color: var(--dark) !important; margin-bottom: 1.5rem !important;
  border: none !important; padding: 0 !important;
}
.sg-section-title em { font-style: italic; font-weight: 300; color: var(--dark); }
.sg-about-text p {
  font-family: 'IBM Plex Sans', sans-serif;
  font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 300; line-height: 1.85;
  color: var(--mid); margin-bottom: 1.2rem;
}
.sg-about-text p strong { font-weight: 500; color: var(--dark); }
.sg-about-cards { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 1px; }
.sg-about-card {
  background: var(--off-white);
  border-left: 3px solid transparent;
  padding: 1.25rem 1.5rem;
  transition: border-color 0.2s, background 0.2s; cursor: default;
}
.sg-about-card:hover { border-left-color: var(--red); background: #e6e0d6; }
.sg-about-card-title {
  font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace;
  font-size: 0.75rem; letter-spacing: 0.1em; text-transform: uppercase;
  color: var(--red); margin-bottom: 0.4rem;
}
.sg-about-card p {
  font-family: 'IBM Plex Sans', sans-serif;
  font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 300; color: var(--mid); line-height: 1.6; margin: 0;
}

/* ──────────────────────────────
   PROJECTS SECTION
────────────────────────────── */
.sg-projects {
  padding: 7rem 4rem;
  background: var(--dark);
}
.sg-projects-inner { max-width: 1200px; margin: 0 auto; }
.sg-projects .sg-section-tag { color: var(--red-light); }
.sg-projects .sg-section-tag::before { background: var(--red-light); }
.sg-projects .sg-section-title { color: var(--cream) !important; }
.sg-projects-intro {
  font-family: 'IBM Plex Sans', sans-serif;
  font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 300; line-height: 1.8;
  color: var(--muted); max-width: 560px; margin-bottom: 4rem;
}
.sg-projects-grid {
  display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
  gap: 1px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.06);
}
.sg-project-card {
  background: var(--dark); padding: 2rem;
  position: relative; overflow: hidden;
  transition: background 0.3s; cursor: default;
}
.sg-project-card::after {
  content:''; position:absolute; bottom:0; left:0; right:0;
  height:2px; background:var(--red);
  transform:scaleX(0); transform-origin:left;
  transition:transform 0.3s ease;
}
.sg-project-card:hover { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.03); }
.sg-project-card:hover::after { transform: scaleX(1); }
.sg-project-num {
  font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace;
  font-size: 0.65rem; letter-spacing: 0.15em; color: var(--red); margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
}
.sg-project-name {
  font-family: 'IBM Plex Sans', sans-serif;
  font-size: 1.15rem; font-weight: 500;
  color: var(--cream); margin-bottom: 0.75rem; line-height: 1.3;
}
.sg-project-desc {
  font-family: 'IBM Plex Sans', sans-serif;
  font-size: 0.85rem; font-weight: 300; line-height: 1.7;
  color: var(--muted); margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
}
.sg-project-tags { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 0.4rem; }
.sg-tag {
  font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace;
  font-size: 0.65rem; letter-spacing: 0.08em;
  padding: 0.2rem 0.55rem;
  border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.12); color: var(--muted);
}
.sg-project-arrow {
  position: absolute; top: 2rem; right: 2rem;
  font-size: 1rem; color: var(--mid);
  transition: color 0.2s, transform 0.2s;
}
.sg-project-card:hover .sg-project-arrow { color: var(--red-light); transform: translate(3px,-3px); }

/* ──────────────────────────────
   FOOTER
────────────────────────────── */
.sg-footer {
  background: var(--dark);
  border-top: 2px solid var(--red);
  padding: 3rem 4rem;
  display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center;
}
.sg-footer-logo {
  font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace;
  font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.8rem; letter-spacing: 0.15em;
  color: var(--cream); text-transform: uppercase;
}
.sg-footer-logo span { color: var(--red-light); }
.sg-footer-note { font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-size: 0.7rem; color: var(--muted); }

/* ──────────────────────────────
   ANIMATIONS
────────────────────────────── */
@keyframes fadeUp {
  from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(20px); }
  to   { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
}

/* ──────────────────────────────
   RESPONSIVE
────────────────────────────── */
@media (max-width: 900px) {
  .sg-hero { min-height: 80vh; }
  .sg-hero-left { padding: 120px 1.5rem 4rem 1.5rem; }
  .sg-stats { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); }
  .sg-about-inner { grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 3rem; }
  .sg-projects-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
  .sg-nav { padding: 0 1.5rem; }
  .sg-about, .sg-projects { padding: 5rem 1.5rem; }
  .sg-footer { flex-direction: column; gap: 1rem; text-align: center; }
}
</style>

<!-- ── CUSTOM NAV ── -->
<nav class="sg-nav">
  <a href="index.html" class="sg-nav-logo">SG <span>CPI</span> Forecast</a>
  <div class="sg-nav-links">
    <a href="#home">Home</a>
    <a href="#about">About</a>
    <a href="https://vaag1ay2526.shinyapps.io/cpi-shiny/" target="_blank">RShiny App</a>
    <a href="proposal.html">Proposal</a>
    <a href="poster.html">Poster</a>
  </div>
</nav>

<!-- ── HERO ── -->
<section class="sg-hero" id="home">
  <div class="sg-hero-left">
    <div class="sg-hero-tag">ISS608 Project · Group 1</div>
    <h1 class="sg-hero-title">
      Forecasting<br>
      <em>Singapore</em><br>
      Customer Price Index (CPI)
    </h1>
    <div class="sg-hero-cta">
      <a href="https://vaag1ay2526.shinyapps.io/cpi-shiny/" target="_blank" class="sg-btn-primary">RShiny App</a>
      <a href="#about"    class="sg-btn-secondary">About the Project</a>
    </div>
  </div>

</section>


<!-- ── STATS BAR ── -->
<div class="sg-stats">
  <div class="sg-stat"><div class="sg-stat-num">6</div><div class="sg-stat-label">Years of CPI data (2020–2025)</div></div>
<div class="sg-stat"><div class="sg-stat-num">4</div><div class="sg-stat-label">Forecasting models compared</div></div>
<div class="sg-stat"><div class="sg-stat-num">51</div><div class="sg-stat-label">CPI leaf-node series forecasted</div></div>
<div class="sg-stat"><div class="sg-stat-num">1.69</div><div class="sg-stat-label">Lowest avg RMSE (ETS model)</div></div>
</div>

<!-- ── ABOUT ── -->
<section class="sg-about" id="about">
  <div class="sg-about-inner">
    <div class="sg-about-text">
      <div class="sg-section-tag">About</div>
      <h2 class="sg-section-title">Understanding <em>Singapore's</em> CPI</h2>
      <p>Singapore's CPI is a critical barometer for policymakers, businesses, and households. As a highly open economy, Singapore's price levels are influenced by global commodity cycles, exchange rate movements, domestic wage growth, and housing costs.</p>
      <p>This project develops and evaluates a suite of <strong>time-series and machine-learning forecasting models</strong> to anticipate CPI movements across headline, core, and sub-component indices — enabling sharper economic planning and policy analysis.</p>
      <p>Data is sourced from <strong>CEIC Data</strong>.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="sg-about-cards">
      <div class="sg-about-card"><div class="sg-about-card-title">01 · Objective</div><p>Evaluate and compare time-series forecasting models to generate 12-month ahead CPI forecasts for Singapore across all expenditure categories.</p></div>
<div class="sg-about-card"><div class="sg-about-card-title">02 · Methodology</div><p>ETS, Auto-ARIMA, ARIMA+XGBoost, and Prophet models, evaluated using nested forecasting with a 12-month holdout test set. Forecasts are reconciled bottom-up using official DOS basket weights.</p></div>
<div class="sg-about-card"><div class="sg-about-card-title">03 · Data Sources</div><p>CEIC Database via SMU Library. Monthly Singapore CPI data (Base: 2024 = 100), covering January 2020 to December 2025.</p></div>
<div class="sg-about-card"><div class="sg-about-card-title">04 · Tools</div><p>Built in R with modeltime, tidymodels, timetk, and plotly. Interactive dashboard developed in R Shiny. Documented via Quarto.</p></div>
<div class="sg-about-card"><div class="sg-about-card-title">05 · Audience</div><p>Economists, policy researchers, and data scientists interested in Singapore macroeconomics and inflation dynamics.</p></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- ── RSHINY APP ── -->
<section class="sg-projects" id="projects">
  <div class="sg-projects-inner">
    <div class="sg-section-tag">RShiny App</div>
    <h2 class="sg-section-title">Interactive Modules</h2>
    <p class="sg-projects-intro">Explore Singapore's CPI data through three interactive modules built in R Shiny — from raw data exploration to model-based forecasting.</p>
    <div class="sg-projects-grid" style="grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);">

      <div class="sg-project-card">
        <div class="sg-project-num">MODULE · 01</div>
        <div class="sg-project-arrow">↗</div>
        <div class="sg-project-name">Exploratory Data Analysis</div>
        <div class="sg-project-desc">Explore Singapore CPI trends, seasonal patterns, and temporal dependencies across expenditure categories. Includes time series plots, seasonal diagnostics, and ACF/PACF analysis.</div>
      </div>

      <div class="sg-project-card">
        <div class="sg-project-num">MODULE · 02</div>
        <div class="sg-project-arrow">↗</div>
        <div class="sg-project-name">Time Series Decomposition</div>
        <div class="sg-project-desc">Decompose CPI series into trend, seasonal, and remainder components using STL. Examine the relative dominance of each component across CPI categories.</div>
      </div>

      <div class="sg-project-card">
        <div class="sg-project-num">MODULE · 03</div>
        <div class="sg-project-arrow">↗</div>
        <div class="sg-project-name">Forecasting</div>
        <div class="sg-project-desc">Explore 12-month CPI forecasts generated using ETS, ARIMA, ARIMA+XGBoost, and Prophet. Switch between auto mode (best model by RMSE) and manual model selection across all CPI hierarchy levels.</div>
      </div>

    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- ── FOOTER ── -->
<footer class="sg-footer">
  <div class="sg-footer-logo">SG <span>CPI</span> Forecast</div>
  <div class="sg-footer-note">Built with R Quarto | CEIC Data</div>
</footer>

<script>
(function() {
  // ── Smooth scroll for all anchor links ──
  document.querySelectorAll('a[href^="#"]').forEach(function(a) {
    a.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
      var href = a.getAttribute('href');
      if (href === '#') return;
      var target = document.querySelector(href);
      if (target) {
        e.preventDefault();
        var offset = 60; // nav height
        var top = target.getBoundingClientRect().top + window.scrollY - offset;
        window.scrollTo({ top: top, behavior: 'smooth' });
      }
    });
  });

  // ── Active nav link on scroll ──
  var navLinks = document.querySelectorAll('.sg-nav-links a');
  var sectionIds = ['home','about','projects'];

  function onScroll() {
    var scrollY = window.scrollY + 80;
    var current = 'home';
    sectionIds.forEach(function(id) {
      var el = document.getElementById(id);
      if (el && el.offsetTop <= scrollY) current = id;
    });
    navLinks.forEach(function(a) {
      var href = a.getAttribute('href').replace('#','');
      a.classList.toggle('active', href === current);
    });
  }
  window.addEventListener('scroll', onScroll, { passive: true });
  onScroll();

  
})();
</script>
```
